title: juncus bulbosus var. soranthus
intro: Juncus bulbosus var. soranthus, also known as Sorrel Rush, is a plant species within the Juncus genus. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sorrel Rush are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Sorrel Rush is often used as a dried herb, added to teas or infusions, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and remedies.
